message:
今日论文速递：video-generation

1. DreamWM: World Models for Controllable Video Generation
   主题：video generation, world model
   摘要：A world model improves controllable video generation quality.
   论文：https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00001v1
   代码：https://github.com/example/dreamwm
   配图：https://arxiv.org/figures/fig2.png

papers.title: DreamWM: World Models for Controllable Video Generation
papers.abstract: A world model improves controllable video generation quality.
